caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with "BOSS TALK" printed in gold, and over-ear headphones sits in a recording studio. He is positioned behind a black microphone attached to a boom arm, facing slightly to his right as he speaks. The background features a white wall with a recurring "UNIQUE HUSTLE" logo and a blue sign that reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". On the desk in front of him is a black mug with red and white text that includes "TALK OUT". Small logos appear in the bottom corners of the scene. Across the sequence, the man remains in the same position, though his facial expressions shift as he continues talking, with his mouth opening and closing in a conversational manner. The camera remains stationary, maintaining a medium shot of the man and his equipment throughout the clip.
